failures.description: The agent misread the ProductCatalogSearch result and concluded there were no matching items even though the tool returned two items above the requested price threshold.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal matched the user request and the required tool call was made correctly. At index 3, the tool returned two matching available RGB mechanical keyboards with prices 272.33 and 237.48, both greater than 233.90. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite conclusion, saying no items match. This directly contradicts the relevant tool output and was not resolved later; the Evaluator repeated the same incorrect interpretation.
